points: Clear pricing, agreed before we start

hero.description: AI automation for SMBs: quotes, documents, email and your management software. Clear pricing from the start, 2026 incentives, and delivery in weeks, not quarters.

scenes.saved_note: Your team approves, the AI prepares.

vision.quote_description: Every company has dozens of hours per month trapped in repetitive work: quotes, emails, documents, data copied by hand from one system to another. Our job is to give them back to you.
vision.image_alt: Laptop glowing in the dark with warm reflections on the screen
vision.image_badge: Clear scope and price, written down before we start
vision.vision_description: Almost everyone in your company already uses ChatGPT for something. Very few companies have brought it into their real processes. That's exactly the step we deliver: no revolutions, no vague promises — one process at a time, measuring the hours recovered. We'll also tell you what NOT to automate: that's the part of the craft the hype merchants skip.
vision.mission_description: We don't ask you to change your ERP, CRM or habits: we connect AI to the tools your company already uses. We start from a small, well-scoped case, with scope and price written down before we begin, with your data staying yours. If the pilot works, we scale. If it doesn't, you know within two weeks — not after six months of consulting.

services.visual_chat_q: What price did we quote Rossi last year?
services.visual_chat_a: €12,400, February order. Want me to draft the new quote?

web_dev.title: Process automation
web_dev.description: Quotes, invoices, recurring emails, reports and data entry that prepare themselves. The AI drafts, your people review and approve: hours recovered every week, starting now.

ux_ui.title: Custom assistants
ux_ui.description: AI assistants trained on your company's documents, price lists and procedures: they answer customers and colleagues with the right information, without making things up and without your data going where it shouldn't.

mobile_dev.title: Web & app development
mobile_dev.description: When something needs building — a client portal, an internal tool, an MVP — we do it with the same logic: clear scope, solid code, short timelines.

ai.title: ERP & CRM integration
ai.description: Your ERP, CRM, spreadsheets and inboxes connected to AI. No new software to learn: the tools you've always used, with much less drudgery inside.

marketing.title: AI Act compliance
marketing.description: When we bring AI into your processes, we get your team compliant with the AI literacy obligation (EU AI Act): usage rules and training on real cases, as part of adoption.

partnership.description: 20 minutes, no strings attached: tell us how your company works and we'll tell you right away what's worth automating, what isn't, and what it would cost. A clear price, agreed before we start.

offers.description: No black-box "contact us for a quote": three ways to work together, with indicative prices and terms already written.

pricing.description: In Italy almost no AI agency shows its prices. We do: clear ranges from the start, confirmed in writing before signing — no surprise sales calls.

automation.name: First Automation
automation.tagline: The process that steals the most hours — quotes, emails, data entry — automated and in production within two weeks.

Set up on your accounts and API keys: your data stays yours
automation.details_tagline: The fastest way to see AI working on your processes: together we pick the flow that steals the most hours — quotes, emails, documents — and in two weeks it's automated, integrated and in production.

audit.name: AI Audit
audit.tagline: A clear picture of where your company loses hours: interviews with the people doing the work, measured processes and a plan ordered by return.
audit.for_whom_value: More structured companies (roughly 30+ employees) or multi-department ones, where there are many processes to fix and the order must be decided before investing.

audit.note: The report is yours: implement the roadmap with us or with whoever you prefer.

audit.details_tagline: The complete picture of where the company loses hours: interviews with the people doing the work, process mapping and a plan ordered by return — with the numbers, timelines and applicable incentives.

sprint.details_tagline: When you need more than an automation, you need a project: we build it around your processes and integrate it properly into the systems you use. In Italy 77% of AI projects are custom integration, not off-the-shelf software — this is that work, done well.

pricing.incentives_description: Incentives vary by province and run out, but in 2026 there are several ways to cover part of the investment. These are the main ones active today:

incentives.title: New Skills Fund (FNC)
incentives.text: In 2026 the FNC reimburses the labour cost of the hours staff spend in AI and digital-skills training — stackable with interprofessional funds that cover the course itself.

incentives.title: Funded training
incentives.text: Interprofessional funds (Fondimpresa, Fondirigenti) often cover up to 100% of staff AI training.

incentives.title: Chamber of Commerce vouchers
incentives.text: Italian Chambers of Commerce fund AI consulting and adoption with coverage up to 70% (e.g. Como-Lecco AI Voucher 2026); active calls vary from province to province.

faq.q: Where does my company's data end up?
faq.a: It stays yours. We configure AI services with European data residency where possible, with no training on your data, and we define in writing what the AI can and cannot see. Compliance (privacy and the AI Act) is part of the job, not an extra.

faq.q: We already have a management system — do we need to replace it?
faq.a: No, quite the opposite: we work inside and around the tools you already use. Most AI projects in Italy are exactly this — integration, not replacement.

faq.q: What if nobody in the company ends up using it?
faq.a: That's why every project includes training for the people who will use the automation, and we always start from a process that saves a specific person real time — not from a tech toy.

faq.q: Why do you show prices? Everyone else says "it depends".
faq.a: Because an honest range helps both of us: you immediately know whether we fit your budget, and we only talk to companies that can actually start. The exact price is agreed on the scope, before signing — and anything beyond it goes on the roadmap, not on the invoice.

faq.q: How do I know you can deliver, if you're a young agency?
faq.a: That's exactly why our offers are built to remove your risk: you start with a small project with a clear cost and the bulk is paid on delivered, working results. Trust is built on the first project, not on promises.

pricing.final_cta_text: Take the free check: 10 questions, 3 minutes, and we'll tell you the right starting point for your company.
pricing.faq_description: Straight answers to the most common doubts about data, costs and how we work. No runaround.
pricing.faq_contact_cta: Write to us — we reply within the day

check.description: 8 questions, 2 minutes, no sign-up needed to see your result: the map of what could run on its own in your company.
questions: Do you have a management system, CRM or ERP used every day?
Is there reasonably organised internal documentation (procedures, price lists, manuals)?
How much time does preparing quotes and proposals cost you?
How much time goes into emails and similar customer requests?
How much manual work do reports, files and recurring documents require?
How much data is copied by hand between emails, spreadsheets and your management system?
How often do you answer questions whose answers already sit in internal documents?
How much manual work do deadlines, reminders and follow-ups require?
check.result_headline: {count, plural, one {1 process where AI could work for you} other {# processes where AI could work for you}}
check.result_none_title: No hot processes — a rare case!
check.result_none_text: Your answers don't surface any heavy processes. Either the company is already very efficient, or it's worth taking a calm look together: sometimes lost time becomes invisible once you're used to it.
check.result_basics_note: Note: some basics seem to be missing (a management system or organised documentation). No problem — it's the most common starting point, and it gets fixed first.
check.report_subject: Your map: what could run on its own in your company
check.report_intro: thanks for taking the AI Check. This is your map: the processes where — based on your answers — AI can take manual work off your company's plate.
check.report_basics_note: Note: some basics seem to be missing (a management system or organised documentation). It's the most common starting point — it gets fixed first.
check.report_outro: In a free 20-minute call we quantify the map on your company: which processes are truly worth it, in what order, and at what prices — clear, before we start.
check.report_footer: You're receiving this email because you completed the AI Check on noxis.agency and left us your details. We use your data only to reply to you: full notice at noxis.agency/privacy.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This notice describes how personal data collected through noxis.agency is processed, pursuant to Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sections.title: Data controller
sections.body:
Andrea Zago — Noxis
Via G. Mazzini 5a, 35010 Trebaseleghe (PD), Italy
VAT no. (P.IVA) 05668260283
Email: hello@noxis.agency

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.body: We process the data you provide when completing the AI Check or writing to us by email: name, email address, phone number, company name, sector, company size, your questionnaire answers and browsing language. The site does not use analytics or profiling tools. Hosting providers may record technical logs (e.g. IP addresses) for security purposes.

sections.title: Why we process it and on what basis
sections.body:
Data is processed to: (a) reply to your request and get back to you with the check results or the information you asked for — legal basis: pre-contractual measures taken at your request (art. 6.1.b GDPR); (b) follow-up communications directly related to your request — legal basis: legitimate interest (art. 6.1.f GDPR).
We don't send newsletters, we don't do mass marketing and we don't hand data over to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: How long we keep it
sections.body: Data is kept for as long as needed to handle your request and in any case no longer than 24 months from the last contact, after which it is deleted. You can request deletion at any time by writing to hello@noxis.agency.

sections.title: Who can access the data
sections.body: Data is never sold or handed over. It is processed by the controller and by technical suppliers acting as data processors: website hosting (Vercel Inc.), managed database and email delivery (Resend Inc.). Some suppliers are based in the United States: any transfer takes place under the safeguards provided by the GDPR (standard contractual clauses and/or the EU-US Data Privacy Framework).

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: The site uses a single technical session cookie, required to access the restricted admin area and exempt from consent. We use no profiling, marketing or analytics cookies — which is why there is no cookie banner.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access your data, rectify it, erase it, restrict its processing, port it and object to its processing (arts. 15-22 GDPR). You can exercise these rights by writing to hello@noxis.agency. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (www.garanteprivacy.it).

sections.title: Updates
sections.body: This notice may be updated over time: the version published on this page is the one in force.
